title: Slider
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Slider wrapper composed from the local Base UI Slider primitive, shadcn slots, base-nova class tokens, deterministic edge thumb geometry, and local class canonicalization.
distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Slider wrapper composed from the local Base UI Slider primitive, shadcn slots, base-nova class tokens, deterministic edge thumb geometry, and local class canonicalization.

registry.reason: shadcn Slider composes the local Base UI Slider primitive.
shadcn Slider uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper.
Provides Effect Schema through the wrapper style options and local Base UI dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit primitive.
React state and effects are origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin controlled example composes Label before that registry item is available; installable source keeps the example local/static instead of adding a missing registry runtime dependency.
Origin RTL example dependency is fixture evidence only and is replaced by local static RTL data.

examples.title: SliderControlled
examples.description: Controlled range slider rendered with deterministic static state and local label text.
examples.distinguishes: Controlled range slider rendered with deterministic static state and local label text.

examples.title: SliderDemo
examples.snippet:
export const SliderDemo = (): Html =>
  slider({
    values: [75],
    max: 100,
    step: 1,
    className: 'mx-auto w-full max-w-xs',
  })

examples.title: SliderDisabled
examples.snippet:
export const SliderDisabled = (): Html =>
  slider({
    values: [50],
    max: 100,
    step: 1,
    isDisabled: true,
    className: 'mx-auto w-full max-w-xs',
  })

examples.title: SliderMultiple
examples.snippet:
export const SliderMultiple = (): Html =>
  slider({
    values: [10, 20, 70],
    max: 100,
    step: 10,
    className: 'mx-auto w-full max-w-xs',
  })

examples.title: SliderRange
examples.snippet:
export const SliderRange = (): Html =>
  slider({
    values: [25, 50],
    max: 100,
    step: 5,
    className: 'mx-auto w-full max-w-xs',
  })

examples.title: SliderRtl
examples.description: RTL Slider layout example with local static direction data.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Slider layout example with local static direction data.
examples.snippet:
export const SliderRtl = (): Html =>
  slider({
    values: [75],
    max: 100,
    step: 1,
    dir: 'rtl',
    className: 'mx-auto w-full max-w-xs',
  })

examples.title: SliderVertical

deviations.summary: Controlled Slider example uses local static label markup instead of depending on shadcn/label.
deviations.rationale: The plan explicitly avoids introducing an installable runtime dependency on a missing registry item. The example preserves the rendered Slider structure and nearby text for parity.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local static direction data instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Static RTL direction preserves the rendered output needed by parity fixtures.
